title: sourcing map 12 Pcs Solid Silicone Flat Washer DN40 2-5/32" OD x 1-1/2" ID x 1/4" Thickness Large Washers O Ring Sealing Gaskets, Industrial Flat Silicone Spacer, White
features: Package Content: 12 pcs of silicone flat washer, Outer Diameter: 2-5/32"(55mm), Inner Diameter: 1-1/2"(42mm), Thickness: 1/4"(6mm) The flat washer may be an error of ±5mm.

Material: The rubber gaskets are made of silicone, resistant to acid and alkali. It boasts strong toughness, low odor, excellent sealing performance, and corrosion resistance. Typically utilized in high-temperature, high-vacuum, high-pressure, and oil environments.

Design: The sealing washers distribute load for fasteners or serve as spacers between components, providing effective shock absorption and sound insulation, and reducing noise, wear and prolonging service life.
Easy to Install: These products feature a non-adhesive sealing surface for easy installation. It allows flexibility to meet your specific requirements without requiring additional tools.

Multiple Use: Mainly used in wrench-type quick connector sealing in the Automotive Industry, Machinery And Equipment, Chemical Industry, Aerospace, Oil And Gas Industry, Household Appliances, Electronic Equipment, Construction Industry, Food And Beverage Industry.
